data.name: Common.OperationCancelled
data.value: Operation was cancelled.

data.name: Validation.FilePathMustBeEmptyForRemote
data.value: File path must be empty for remote file sources.

data.name: Validation.FilePathRequiredForLocal
data.value: File path is required for local file sources.

data.name: Validation.IngestionFileIdsDistinct
data.value: Ingestion file IDs must be unique.

data.name: Validation.GroupIdsDistinct
data.value: Group IDs must be unique.

data.name: Validation.EvaluationIdsDistinct
data.value: Evaluation IDs must be unique.

data.name: Validation.OperationIdsDistinct
data.value: Operation IDs must be unique.

data.name: Validation.ArchiveIngestionFileIdsNoEmpty
data.value: Ingestion file IDs cannot contain empty guid values.

data.name: Validation.ArchiveIngestionFileIdsDistinct
data.value: Ingestion file IDs must be unique.

data.name: Validation.ArchivePreviewLimitRange
data.value: Preview limit must be between 0 and 10,000.

data.name: Validation.ArchiveMaxFilesRange
data.value: Max files must be between 0 and 10,000.

data.name: Validation.OperationIdNotEmpty
data.value: Operation ID must not be empty.

data.name: Validation.RejectCommentRequired
data.value: A comment is required for rejection.

data.name: Validation.FileSourceTypeInvalid
data.value: File source type is invalid. Allowed values: Remote (1), Local (2).

data.name: Validation.FileTypeInvalid
data.value: File type is invalid. Allowed values: Card (1), Clearing (2).

data.name: Validation.FileContentTypeInvalid
data.value: File content type is invalid. Allowed values: Bkm (1), Msc (2), Visa (3).

data.name: Validation.CommentMaxLength
data.value: Comment must not exceed 2000 characters.

data.name: Validation.EvaluateChunkSizeRange
data.value: Chunk size must be between 100 and 10,000.

data.name: Validation.EvaluateClaimTimeoutRange
data.value: Claim timeout must be between 30 and 3,600 seconds.

data.name: Validation.EvaluateClaimRetryCountRange
data.value: Claim retry count must be between 1 and 10.

data.name: Validation.EvaluateOperationMaxRetriesRange
data.value: Operation max retries must be between 0 and 50.

data.name: Validation.ExecuteMaxEvaluationsRange
data.value: Max evaluations must be between 1 and 100,000.

data.name: Validation.ExecuteLeaseSecondsRange
data.value: Lease seconds must be between 1 and 3,600.

data.name: Validation.BeforeDateCannotBeFuture
data.value: Before date cannot be in the future.

data.name: Validation.AlertStatusInvalid
data.value: Alert status is invalid.

data.name: Validation.DateCannotBeFuture
data.value: Date cannot be in the future.

data.name: Validation.PageSizeRange
data.value: Page size must be between 1 and 1,000.

data.name: Validation.PageNumberMinimum
data.value: Page number must be at least 1.

data.name: FileIngestion.ParseError
data.value: Failed to parse field '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.ParseErrorDetail
data.value: Field '{0}' could not be parsed. Attempted value: '{1}'. Expected format: '{2}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.DatabaseOperationFailed
data.value: Database operation failed.

data.name: FileIngestion.FileNotFoundForFile
data.value: File not found: '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.AccessDeniedForFile
data.value: Access denied for file: '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.IoErrorForFile
data.value: I/O error occurred for file: '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.OperationFailedForFile
data.value: Operation failed for file: '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.TransferFailed
data.value: File transfer failed.

data.name: FileIngestion.FileNotFound
data.value: File not found.

data.name: FileIngestion.AccessDenied
data.value: Access denied.

data.name: FileIngestion.IoError
data.value: I/O error occurred.

data.name: FileIngestion.InvalidOperation
data.value: Invalid operation.

data.name: FileIngestion.InvalidArgument
data.value: Invalid argument.

data.name: FileIngestion.FormatError
data.value: Format error.

data.name: FileIngestion.NotSupported
data.value: Operation not supported.

data.name: FileIngestion.Timeout
data.value: Operation timed out.

data.name: FileIngestion.HttpError
data.value: HTTP request failed.

data.name: FileIngestion.InternalError
data.value: An internal error occurred.

data.name: FileIngestion.InvalidRequest
data.value: Invalid ingestion request.

data.name: FileIngestion.NoMatchingFile
data.value: No matching files found for profile '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.Cancelled
data.value: File ingestion was cancelled.

data.name: FileIngestion.ImportFailed
data.value: File import failed.

data.name: FileIngestion.OperationCancelled
data.value: File ingestion operation was cancelled.

data.name: FileIngestion.ImportStarted
data.value: Import started.

data.name: FileIngestion.ReArchiveStarted
data.value: Previously archived file data changed. Re-archiving started.

data.name: FileIngestion.DuplicateFileReceived
data.value: The same file was received successfully before.

data.name: FileIngestion.ReprocessedSuccessfully
data.value: Reprocessed successfully.

data.name: FileIngestion.RowRetryLimitExceeded
data.value: Row retry limit exceeded for line {0}.

data.name: FileIngestion.ParsedAndPersistedSuccessfully
data.value: Parsed and persisted successfully.

data.name: FileIngestion.ReconciliationKeyNotGenerated
data.value: {0} Reconciliation key could not be generated.

data.name: FileIngestion.ExpectedCountMismatch
data.value: The expected detail line count ({0}) does not match the processed line count ({1}).

data.name: FileIngestion.LinesInvalid
data.value: {0} lines are invalid.

data.name: FileIngestion.FileCopyFailed
data.value: The file could not be copied to the target path.

data.name: FileIngestion.FileImportedNotArchived
data.value: The file was imported into the environment but could not be archived. Error: {0}

data.name: FileIngestion.FileProcessedSuccessfully
data.value: The file was processed successfully.

data.name: FileIngestion.IngestionFailedDefault
data.value: File ingestion failed. See errors for details.

data.name: FileIngestion.IngestionFailedWithMessage
data.value: File ingestion failed. {0}

data.name: FileIngestion.ArchiveStatusUpdateRowMismatch
data.value: Archive status update affected {0} rows for IngestionFileId={1}.

data.name: FileIngestion.HeaderNotResolved
data.value: Header record could not be resolved from file '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.FooterNotResolved
data.value: Footer record could not be resolved from file '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.HeaderNotFound
data.value: Header record not found in file '{0}': {1}

data.name: FileIngestion.FooterNotFound
data.value: Footer record not found in file '{0}': {1}

data.name: FileIngestion.InvalidBoundaryRecord
data.value: Invalid boundary record in file '{0}': {1}

data.name: FileIngestion.BoundaryRecordReadFailed
data.value: Failed to read the boundary records from file '{0}': {1}

data.name: FileIngestion.BoundaryRecordEmpty
data.value: File {0} record could not be resolved.

data.name: FileIngestion.RecordTypeMismatch
data.value: Expected record type '{0}' but found '{1}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.PropertyNotDefined
data.value: Property '{0}' is not defined on '{1}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.PropertyEmpty
data.value: Property '{0}' is empty on '{1}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.FooterTxnCountMissing
data.value: Footer model '{0}' does not define TxnCount.

data.name: FileIngestion.FilePatternMismatch
data.value: File '{0}' does not match configured profile pattern.

data.name: FileIngestion.ProfileNotConfigured
data.value: File profile '{0}' is not configured.

data.name: FileIngestion.ParsingNotDefined
data.value: File profile parsing configuration is not defined.

data.name: FileIngestion.RecordNotFoundFromStart
data.value: Record '{0}' could not be found from the file start.

data.name: FileIngestion.RecordNotFoundFromEnd
data.value: Record '{0}' could not be found from the file end.

data.name: FileIngestion.EntityTypeNotMapped
data.value: IngestionFileLine entity type is not mapped.

data.name: FileIngestion.SqlBulkInsertFailed
data.value: SQL Server bulk insert operation failed: {0}

data.name: FileIngestion.PostgreBulkInsertFailed
data.value: PostgreSQL bulk insert operation failed: {0}

data.name: FileIngestion.BulkPropertyMappingNotDefined
data.value: Bulk property mapping is not defined for entity '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.PropertyNotMapped
data.value: Property '{0}' is not mapped for entity '{1}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.UnsupportedBulkType
data.value: Unsupported PostgreSQL bulk type '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.BoundaryReadFailed
data.value: Failed to read or parse file boundary records: {0}

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.FileKeyGenerationFailed
data.value: Failed to generate unique file key from header and footer records.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.DuplicateCheckFailed
data.value: Failed to check if the file was previously ingested.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.DuplicateInsertNotResolved
data.value: A duplicate file insert was detected, but the existing file record could not be resolved.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.FileEntityCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create the transaction file record in the database.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveOpenFailed
data.value: Failed to open the target archive for writing.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.FileStreamOpenFailed
data.value: Failed to open the source file for reading.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.FileProcessingError
data.value: Error during file line processing at line {0}: {1}

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveFinalizeFailed
data.value: Failed to finalize the target archive.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveError
data.value: Archive error: {0}

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveStatusUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to update the archive status in the database.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.FileFinalizeFailed
data.value: Failed to finalize the file state in the database.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.FileRetrievalFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve the finalized file record.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryInitFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve the file for recovery.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryMissingRowsFailed
data.value: Failed to recover missing rows for the file.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryFailedRowsFailed
data.value: Failed to retry failed rows for the file.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryStatusCheckFailed
data.value: Failed to check the file status during recovery.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryArchiveFailed
data.value: Failed to retry the archive operation during recovery.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryFinalizeFailed
data.value: Failed to finalize the file state after recovery.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryFinalRetrievalFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve the recovered file.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryStreamOpenFailed
data.value: Failed to open the source file for recovery.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RecoveryMissingRowsProcessingError
data.value: Error processing missing rows at line {0}: {1}

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.RowRetryFailed
data.value: Failed to reprocess row {0}: {1}

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.FailedRowBatchRetryFailed
data.value: Failed to retry the failed row batch.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveRetryInitFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve the file for archive retry.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveStreamOpenTargetFailed
data.value: Failed to open the target archive stream for writing.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveStreamOpenSourceFailed
data.value: Failed to open the source file stream for reading during archive.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveStreamCopyFailed
data.value: Failed to copy the source file to the archive.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveMarkCompleteFailed
data.value: Failed to mark the file as archived.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveMarkIncompleteFailed
data.value: Failed to mark the file as not archived after the archive failure.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveRetryFinalizeFailed
data.value: Failed to finalize the file state after archive retry.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.ArchiveRetryFinalRetrievalFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve the file after archive retry.

data.name: FileIngestion.UnsupportedProtocol
data.value: Unsupported file transfer protocol: '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.LocalPathNotConfigured
data.value: Local path is not configured for profile '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.LocalRootPathEmpty
data.value: Local root path is empty for profile '{0}'.

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpConnecting
data.value: FTP connecting to {Host}:{Port} (attempt {Attempt}/{MaxAttempts}, endpoint: {EndpointType}, method: {Method})

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpConnected
data.value: FTP request to {Host}:{Port} succeeded on attempt {Attempt}

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpConnectionFailed
data.value: FTP connection failed to {Host}:{Port} after {MaxAttempts} attempts. Last error: {ErrorMessage} (Status: {WebExceptionStatus})

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpConnectionRetry
data.value: FTP connection attempt {Attempt}/{MaxAttempts} to {Host}:{Port} failed: {ErrorMessage} (Status: {WebExceptionStatus}). Retrying in {Delay}s...

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpUploadConnecting
data.value: FTP upload connecting to {Host}:{Port} (attempt {Attempt}/{MaxAttempts}, endpoint: {EndpointType})

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpUploadConnected
data.value: FTP upload stream to {Host}:{Port} opened on attempt {Attempt}

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpUploadConnectionFailed
data.value: FTP upload connection failed to {Host}:{Port} after {MaxAttempts} attempts. Last error: {ErrorMessage} (Status: {WebExceptionStatus})

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpUploadConnectionRetry
data.value: FTP upload attempt {Attempt}/{MaxAttempts} to {Host}:{Port} failed: {ErrorMessage} (Status: {WebExceptionStatus}). Retrying in {Delay}s...

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpRetryExhausted
data.value: FTP retry loop exited unexpectedly.

data.name: FileIngestion.FtpUploadRetryExhausted
data.value: FTP upload retry loop exited unexpectedly.

data.name: FileIngestion.SftpConnecting
data.value: SFTP connecting to {Host}:{Port} (attempt {Attempt}/{MaxAttempts}, endpoint: {EndpointType}, timeout: {Timeout}s)

data.name: FileIngestion.SftpConnected
data.value: SFTP connected to {Host}:{Port} on attempt {Attempt}

data.name: FileIngestion.SftpConnectionFailed
data.value: SFTP connection failed to {Host}:{Port} after {MaxAttempts} attempts. Last error: {ErrorMessage}

data.name: FileIngestion.SftpConnectionRetry
data.value: SFTP connection attempt {Attempt}/{MaxAttempts} to {Host}:{Port} failed: {ErrorMessage}. Retrying in {Delay}s...

data.name: Config.FileIngestion.VaultConfigMissing
data.value: Vault key missing: CardSecrets/FileIngestion (Connections and Profiles are required)

data.value: Vault configuration missing: FileIngestion.Connections

data.name: Config.FileIngestion.ProtocolMissing

data.name: Config.Sftp.TimeoutMustBePositive

data.name: Reconciliation.EvaluationFailed
data.value: Reconciliation evaluation failed.

data.value: Manual review approval failed.

data.value: Manual review approval could not be completed.

data.value: Manual review approval failed. See errors for details.

data.value: Manual review rejection could not be completed.

data.name: Reconciliation.ManualReviewRejectionFailedSeeErrors
data.value: Manual review rejection failed. See errors for details.

data.name: Reconciliation.ApprovalMessage
data.value: If approved, the transaction will follow the 'Approve' flow.

data.name: Reconciliation.RejectionMessage
data.value: If rejected, the transaction will follow the 'Reject' flow.

data.name: Reconciliation.PendingReviewsLoadFailed
data.value: Pending reconciliation reviews could not be loaded.

data.name: Reconciliation.ReviewNotFound
data.value: Review record was not found for the manual operation.

data.name: Reconciliation.ReviewAlreadyFinalized
data.value: Review decision is already finalized.

data.name: Reconciliation.ReviewOperationNotFound
data.value: The operation linked to the manual review was not found.

data.name: Reconciliation.ReviewOperationNotRequeueable
data.value: The manual review decision could not be applied because the operation is in '{0}' status.

data.name: Reconciliation.ManualReviewResult
data.value: Manual review {0}.

data.name: Reconciliation.ManualReviewDecisionPersistFailed
data.value: Manual review decision could not be persisted.

data.name: Reconciliation.ManualReviewDecisionFailedSeeErrors
data.value: Manual review decision failed. See errors for details.

data.name: Reconciliation.ReviewerNotResolved
data.value: Reviewer identifier could not be resolved from the authenticated user or request payload.

data.name: Reconciliation.AlertsLoadFailed
data.value: Failed to load reconciliation alerts.

data.name: Reconciliation.OperationAlreadyApplied
data.value: Operation was already applied for this transaction.

data.name: Reconciliation.OperationFailed
data.value: Operation '{0}' failed.

data.value: Unexpected error occurred while executing operation '{0}'.

data.name: Reconciliation.OperationExecutionFailed
data.value: Operation execution failed.

data.name: Reconciliation.EvaluationExecutionFailed
data.value: Execution of evaluation '{0}' failed unexpectedly.

data.value: Failed to retrieve pending reviews.

data.value: Failed to retrieve alerts.

data.value: Manual review record could not be resolved.

data.value: Operation completed successfully.

data.value: Reconciliation request is null.

data.value: Alert already exists for the operation.

data.value: Alert record was created.

data.value: Manual branch completed with {0}.

data.value: Wallet binding could not be resolved for the card.

data.value: Chargeback requires an existing Payify transaction and wallet binding.

data.value: Reconciliation evaluation completed with {0} error(s) for {1} file(s).

data.value: Branch operations require a preceding manual gate operation.

data.name: Reconciliation.FileNotResolved
data.value: IngestionFile '{0}' could not be resolved.

data.name: Reconciliation.EmoneyLookupFailed
data.value: Emoney transaction lookup failed. Evaluation skipped for related rows.

data.value: Unsupported reconciliation content type '{0}'.

data.value: No reconciliation evaluator registered for '{0}'.

data.value: Operation payload is empty.

data.value: Operation payload could not be deserialized.

data.value: Operation payload value '{0}.{1}' is missing.

data.value: Operation payload value '{0}' could not be converted to '{1}'.

data.name: Reconciliation.EmoneyLookupStatusFailed
data.value: Emoney transaction lookup failed with status code {0} for customerTransactionId '{1}'.

data.name: Reconciliation.EmoneyLookupForCustomerFailed
data.value: Emoney transaction lookup failed for customerTransactionId '{0}'.

data.name: Reconciliation.EmoneyLookupStatusFailedForTransaction
data.value: Emoney transaction lookup failed with status code {0} for transactionId '{1}'.

data.name: Reconciliation.EmoneyLookupForTransactionFailed
data.value: Emoney transaction lookup failed for transactionId '{0}'.

data.name: Reconciliation.ExternalCommandStubbed
data.value: External command was stubbed and accepted.

data.name: Reconciliation.CustomerTxnLookupFailed
data.value: customerTransactionId '{0}' lookup failed. {1}

data.name: FileIngestion.RequestIsNull
data.value: File ingestion request is null.

data.name: FileIngestion.NoFileMatchedProfile
data.value: No file matched profile '{0}'. Please verify the file path and profile configuration.

data.name: FileIngestion.ImportFailedNoDetails
data.value: File import failed without specific error details.

data.name: FileIngestion.TargetArchiveOpenFailed
data.value: Failed to open target archive writer for profile '{ProfileKey}', file '{FileName}': {ErrorMessage}

data.name: FileIngestion.TargetArchiveWriteFailed
data.value: Target archive write failed: {ErrorMessage}

data.name: FileIngestion.TargetArchiveFinalizeFailed
data.value: Target archive finalize failed: {ErrorMessage}

data.name: Consumer.JobFailed
data.value: Consumer job failed. Type={JobType}

data.name: Consumer.IngestionRequestNull
data.value: IngestionRequest is null. Cannot process IngestFile job without a request payload.

data.name: Consumer.UnknownJobType
data.value: Unknown job type: '{0}'. Supported types: IngestFile, Evaluate, Execute.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.CurrentCardRowMissing
data.value: Current card row is missing.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.FileLengthValidationNote
data.value: File-level length validation failed. Raise an alert.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.FileLengthValidationOp
data.value: File-level length validation failed.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.OriginalTxnNotResolvedNote
data.value: The original transaction could not be resolved for the cancel/reversal record. Raise an alert and require manual review.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.OriginalTxnNotResolvedOp
data.value: The original transaction could not be resolved for the cancel/reversal record.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.AlreadyCancelledNote
data.value: The transaction is already cancelled. No action is required.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ReversalNotCancelledNote
data.value: This is a reversal/void record for a transaction that is not yet cancelled. Cancel the original transaction and create the reverse entry.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ReverseOriginalOp
data.value: Reverse the effect of the original transaction.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.FailedBothNote
data.value: The Card Transaction record is FAILED and the Payify record is also FAILED. No action is required.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.FailedMissingPayifyNote
data.value: The Card Transaction record is FAILED and there is no Payify record. No action is required.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.FailedSuccessfulPayifyNote
data.value: The Card Transaction record is FAILED while the Payify record is SUCCESSFUL. Correct the response code and transaction status, then reverse the balance effect.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.CorrectResponseCodeOp
data.value: Correct the response code.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ConvertToFailedOp
data.value: Move the transaction to FAILED status.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ReverseByBalanceOp
data.value: Create a reverse entry based on the balance effect.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ExpiredPayifyFailedNote
data.value: The Payify status is FAILED. Move the transaction to EXPIRE status and close the flow.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.MoveToExpiredOp
data.value: Move the transaction to EXPIRE status.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ExpiredMissingPayifyNote
data.value: There is no Payify record. Create the transaction and move it to EXPIRE status.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.CreateTransactionOp
data.value: Create the missing transaction.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.AccPendingMatchNote
data.value: An ACC ControlStat=P match was found within the last 20 days for the EXPIRE record. Raise an alert and require manual review.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.AccPendingMatchOp
data.value: An ACC ControlStat=P match was found for the EXPIRE record.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ExpiredSuccessfulNoAccNote
data.value: The Card Transaction record is EXPIRE, the Payify record is SUCCESSFUL, and there is no ACC match. Move the transaction to EXPIRE status and reverse the balance effect.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.NotSettledNote
data.value: TxnSettle != Y. No action is required.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.SuccessfulFailedPayifyNote
data.value: The Card Transaction record is SUCCESSFUL while the Payify record is FAILED. Correct the response code and transaction status, then reverse the balance effect.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ConvertToSuccessfulOp
data.value: Move the transaction to SUCCESSFUL status.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.SuccessfulMissingNonRefundNote
data.value: The Card Transaction record is SUCCESSFUL while the Payify record is MISSING. Create the transaction and apply the refund/effect based on the original transaction.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ApplyOriginalEffectOp
data.value: Execute the refund by original transaction.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.PayifyNotResolvedNote
data.value: The Payify record could not be resolved. Raise an alert and require manual review.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.AmountsEqualNote
data.value: Transaction.Amount equals CardTransaction.BillingAmount. No action is required.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.AmountLessThanBillingNote
data.value: Transaction.Amount is less than CardTransaction.BillingAmount. Create a shadow balance entry.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.InsertShadowBalanceOp
data.value: Create a shadow balance entry.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.RunShadowBalanceOp
data.value: Run the shadow balance process.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.AmountGreaterNote
data.value: Transaction.Amount is greater than BillingAmount. No action is required.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.LinkedRefundNote
data.value: The refund is linked. Execute the matched refund.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.LinkedRefundOp
data.value: Execute the matched refund.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.UnlinkedRefundNote
data.value: The refund is unlinked. Create a manual review item and await approve/reject.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.UnlinkedRefundManualOp
data.value: Create a manual review item for the unlinked refund.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ApplyEffectAfterApproval
data.value: Apply the effect execution plan after approval.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.StartChargebackAfterRejection
data.value: Start the chargeback flow after rejection.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.DuplicateConflictNote
data.value: The duplicate records are conflicting. Do not process both records and raise an alert.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.DuplicateConflictOp
data.value: The duplicate records are conflicting.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.DuplicateEquivalentNote
data.value: Equivalent duplicate records will be processed as a single transaction. Raise an alert.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.DuplicateEquivalentOp
data.value: Equivalent duplicate records were detected.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.AwaitingClearingNote
data.value: Clearing data not yet received. Transaction kept OUT of financial reconciliation; waiting for clearing arrival. No balance-affecting operation performed.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.AwaitingClearingAlertOp
data.value: Awaiting clearing — no automatic financial correction will be applied until clearing arrives. Alert raised.

data.name: Reconciliation.Msc.RulesNotDefined
data.value: MSC evaluator rules are not defined yet. No automatic or manual action was produced.

data.name: Reconciliation.Visa.RulesNotDefined
data.value: Visa evaluator rules are not defined yet. No automatic or manual action was produced.

data.name: Archive.OperationCancelled
data.value: Archive operation was cancelled.

data.name: Archive.InvalidOperation
data.value: Invalid operation.

data.name: Archive.InvalidArgument
data.value: Invalid argument.

data.name: Archive.Timeout
data.value: Operation timed out.

data.name: Archive.InternalError
data.value: An internal error occurred.

data.name: Archive.PreviewFailed
data.value: Archive preview failed.

data.name: Archive.RunFailed
data.value: Archive run failed.

data.name: Archive.BatchCreationFailed
data.value: Archive batch creation failed.

data.name: Archive.SnapshotNotFound
data.value: Snapshot not found for the given ingestion file.

data.name: Archive.EligibilityCheckFailed
data.value: Eligibility check failed: {0}

data.name: Archive.LiveCountsNotCleared
data.value: Live aggregate rows remain after archive delete.

data.name: Archive.VerificationFailed
data.value: Archive verification failed for {0}. Expected={1}, Actual={2}.

data.name: Archive.UnsupportedBeforeDateStrategy
data.value: Unsupported DefaultBeforeDateStrategy: '{0}'. Supported values: {1}.

data.name: Reconciliation.AutoArchiveCompleted
data.value: Archive auto-run completed successfully after reconciliation execute.

data.name: Reconciliation.AutoArchiveFailed
data.value: Archive auto-run failed after successful reconciliation execute.

data.name: Alert.Disabled
data.value: AlertService skipped because alert settings are disabled.

data.name: Alert.RecipientListEmpty
data.value: AlertService skipped because recipient list is empty.

data.name: Alert.NoAlertsToProcess
data.value: AlertService found no alerts to process.

data.name: Alert.SkippedAlreadyPicked
data.value: Alert skipped because it was already picked by another process.

data.name: Alert.ProcessedSuccessfully
data.value: Alert processed successfully.

data.name: Alert.ProcessingFailed
data.value: AlertService failed to process alert.

data.name: Alert.NoExecutionRecord
data.value: No execution record found.

data.value: Alert Type

data.name: Alert.Summary.Severity
data.value: Severity

data.value: Evaluation Status

data.value: Operation Code

data.name: Alert.Summary.Execution
data.value: Execution

data.name: Alert.Summary.Description
data.value: Description

data.name: Alert.Template.Title
data.value: Reconciliation Alert Notification

data.name: Alert.Template.Description
data.value: A record requiring attention has been detected during the reconciliation process.

data.value: Alert Type

data.name: Alert.Template.LabelSeverity
data.value: Severity

data.name: Alert.Template.LabelError
data.value: Error

data.value: Technical Details

data.value: Alert

data.value: Operation

data.name: Alert.Detail.LatestExecutionHeader
data.value: Latest Execution

data.name: Alert.Detail.ExecutionHistoryHeader
data.value: Execution History

data.value: Alert Id

data.value: Alert Type

data.name: Alert.Detail.Severity
data.value: Severity

data.name: Alert.Detail.GroupId
data.value: Group Id

data.name: Alert.Detail.FileLineId
data.value: File Line Id

data.name: Alert.Detail.Message
data.value: Message

data.name: Alert.Detail.Id
data.value: Id

data.name: Alert.Detail.Status
data.value: Status

data.name: Alert.Detail.CreatedOperationCount
data.value: Created Operation Count

data.name: Alert.Detail.Code
data.value: Code

data.name: Alert.Detail.Note
data.value: Note

data.name: Alert.Detail.Branch
data.value: Branch

data.name: Alert.Detail.LeaseOwner
data.value: Lease Owner

data.value: Retry Count

data.value: Max Retries

data.value: Next Attempt At

data.value: Last Error

data.value: Attempt Number

data.value: Response Payload Preview

data.name: Alert.Detail.AttemptPrefix
data.value: Attempt

data.name: Handler.FileIngestion.Failed
data.value: File ingestion handler failed. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reconciliation.EvaluateFailed
data.value: Reconciliation evaluate handler failed. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reconciliation.ExecuteFailed
data.value: Reconciliation execute handler failed. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reconciliation.ApproveFailed
data.value: Reconciliation approve handler failed. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reconciliation.RejectFailed
data.value: Reconciliation reject handler failed. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reconciliation.GetPendingReviewsFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve pending reviews. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reconciliation.GetAlertsFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve alerts. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Archive.RunFailed
data.value: Archive run handler failed. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Archive.PreviewFailed
data.value: Archive preview handler failed. See errors for details.

data.value: File ingestion error [{0}].

data.name: Reconciliation.ApiError
data.value: Reconciliation error [{0}].

data.name: Archive.ApiError
data.value: Archive error [{0}].

data.name: Handler.Reporting.IngestionFileOverviewFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve ingestion file overview. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.IngestionFileQualityFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve ingestion file quality. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.IngestionDailySummaryFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve ingestion daily summary. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.IngestionNetworkMatrixFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve ingestion network matrix. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.IngestionExceptionHotspotsFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve ingestion exception hotspots. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconDailyOverviewFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve reconciliation daily overview. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconOpenItemsFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve reconciliation open items. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconOpenItemAgingFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve reconciliation open item aging. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconManualReviewQueueFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve reconciliation manual review queue. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconAlertSummaryFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve reconciliation alert summary. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconLiveCardContentDailyFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve live card content daily report. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconLiveClearingContentDailyFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve live clearing content daily report. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconArchiveCardContentDailyFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve archive card content daily report. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconArchiveClearingContentDailyFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve archive clearing content daily report. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconContentDailyFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve reconciliation content daily report. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconClearingControlStatFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve clearing control stat analysis. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconFinancialSummaryFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve reconciliation financial summary. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ReconResponseStatusFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve response status analysis. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ArchiveRunOverviewFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve archive run overview. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ArchiveEligibilityFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve archive eligibility. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ArchiveBacklogTrendFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve archive backlog trend. See errors for details.

data.name: Handler.Reporting.ArchiveRetentionSnapshotFailed
data.value: Failed to retrieve archive retention snapshot. See errors for details.

data.name: Reconciliation.LateClearingRequeuedAtFinalize
data.value: Late-arriving clearing detected at finalize; requeued to re-evaluate.

data.name: Reconciliation.Bkm.ExpiredWithAuthoritativeClearingNote
data.value: Card transaction is EXPIRED, Payify record is SUCCESSFUL and Clearing is AUTHORITATIVELY CONFIRMED by the scheme (Normal/ProblemToNormal). Because the scheme has funded the transaction, automatic expire + reverse is NOT applied; an operator must approve the action.

data.name: FileIngestion.Detail.NoActiveEfTransactionForCopy
data.value: No active EF Core transaction for PostgreSQL COPY.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.ClearPinEmpty
data.value: ClearPin must not be empty.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.ClearPinDigitsOnly
data.value: ClearPin must contain only digits.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.ClearPinLengthRange
data.value: ClearPin length must be between 4 and 12 characters.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.ClearPanEmpty
data.value: Clear card number must not be empty.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.ClearPanDigitsOnly
data.value: Clear card number must contain only digits.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.ClearPanInvalid
data.value: Clear card number is invalid.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.EncryptedBlockEmpty
data.value: EncryptedBlock must not be empty.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.EncryptedBlockHexLength
data.value: EncryptedBlock must be 16 hexadecimal characters.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.EncryptedBlockHexOnly
data.value: EncryptedBlock must contain only hexadecimal characters.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.DecryptedBlockInvalid
data.value: Decrypted data block is invalid.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.DataLengthUnresolved
data.value: Data length could not be resolved.

data.name: Paycore.PinBlock.ZpkSizeInvalid
data.value: ZPK must be 16 or 24 bytes.
